name: emergent
documentation:
# Modelpy

Run the following command to install modelpy to your virtual environment:
`python3 -m pip install modelpy`

Thanks for using Modelpy!

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.update_parameters
documentation: Takes a dictionary of the form {parameter: value} to update the parameters of the model.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.delete_parameters
documentation:
Takes a list of parameter keys and deletes each key from the parameters dictionary.
If no parameters are passed in, then this method will reset the model's parameters to its defaults.
If a default parameter or non-existent parameter is passed in, this method will raise an exception.
Returns true if the deletion was successful.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.list_parameters
documentation: Returns a list of all the model's parameter keys.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.get_graph
documentation: Returns the networkx graph object representing the model's current graphical state.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.set_initial_data_function
documentation: Sets the function that the model will use to generate initial data.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.set_timestep_function
documentation: Sets the function that the model will use to timestep.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.initialize_graph
documentation: Initializes each node in the graph using the specified initial_data_function.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.timestep
documentation: Runs one timestep of the model, mutating the model by passing it to the user's specified timestep_generator function.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.run_to_convergence
documentation:
Timesteps the model until time == MAX_TIMESTEPS or the specified convergence_data_key variable
has converged to within the specified convergence_std_dev for all nodes. Returns the timestep t of convergence.

methods.name: emergent.main.AgentModel.is_converged
documentation:
Checks whether the specified data_key variable has converged to within the specified std_dev for all nodes.
Returns true if the model has converged, and false if not.
